scriptLines:
query: 'SELECT 
    CAST(YEAR(fecha_unica) * 10000 + MONTH(fecha_unica) * 100 + DAY(fecha_unica) AS INT) AS fecha_key,
    CAST(fecha_unica AS DATE) AS fecha,
    DATEPART(WEEKDAY, fecha_unica) AS dia_semana,
    DATENAME(WEEKDAY, fecha_unica) AS nombre_dia,
    DAY(fecha_unica) AS dia_mes,
    MONTH(fecha_unica) AS mes,
    DATENAME(MONTH, fecha_unica) AS nombre_mes,
    DATEPART(QUARTER, fecha_unica) AS trimestre,
    YEAR(fecha_unica) AS anio,
    CAST(CASE WHEN DATEPART(WEEKDAY, fecha_unica) IN (6, 7) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS BIT) AS es_fin_semana
FROM (
    SELECT fecha_inscripcion AS fecha_unica FROM silver.tbl_inscripciones WHERE fecha_inscripcion IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT fecha_control FROM silver.tbl_controles_prenatales WHERE fecha_control IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT fecha_control FROM silver.tbl_controles_pediatricos WHERE fecha_control IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT fecha_parto FROM silver.tbl_partos WHERE fecha_parto IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT fecha_pago FROM silver.tbl_pagos WHERE fecha_pago IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT fecha_entrega FROM silver.tbl_entregas_subsidio WHERE fecha_entrega IS NOT NULL
) AS todas_las_fechas
GROUP BY fecha_unica',
